Faults.message:
We're sorry about the power cut in the area. The power cut is affecting some properties in the area shown on the map, but not all. This is why you may notice some of your neighbours have power, but you don't. It is normal to see 1 in 3 homes affected. We are working with our engineers to fix the problem as quickly as possible, and well keep you updated here on PowerTrack.

Our specialist engineer Ed has located a faulty joint outside of Woodburn House and we're waiting for an update from Kadent gas to ensure it is safe to dig down to our equipment. At this stage, we're aiming to have your power back on by 18:00 08/04/2026. If this changes, we'll let you know.

The cause of this power cut is a fault on our underground network. This is the most common type of fault we see, and our teams are very experienced in dealing with these issues.

If you need more information, please send us a message on Whatsapp or call us on 105 and quote reference 'SY7931'
Faults.name: HP10 Area

Faults.message:
We're sorry about the continued power cut in the area. The power cut is affecting some properties in the area shown on the map, but not all. This is why you may notice some of your neighbours have power, but you don't. It is normal to see 1 in 3 homes affected. We are working with our engineers to fix the problem as quickly as possible, and well keep you updated here on PowerTrack.

Our first response engineer tried replacing fuses at the Leigh Street substation, but this unfortunately was not successful. We are waiting for further specialist engineers to become available. It is busier than usual just now, but we'll be sending our engineers to the area as soon as possible. When they're on their way, we'll let you know what time they'll be arriving. At this stage, we're aiming to have your power back on by21:00 08/04/2026.

The cause of this power cut is a fault on our network. This is the most common type of fault we see, and our teams are very experienced in dealing with these issues. In most cases, our engineers are able to get your power back on by simply replacing a fuse at the local substation, however, if the fault is severe, this may take us longer to fix. If this does happen, we will let you know.

If you need more information, please send us a message on Whatsapp or call us on 105 and quote reference 'SY8052'
Faults.name: HP11 Area

Faults.message:
We're sorry about the power cut in the area. The power cut is affecting 22 properties in the area shown on the map. We are working with our engineers to fix the problem as quickly as possible, and will keep you updated here on Power Track.

Our engineers need to replace a pole mounted transformer to restore power supplies but we may look at getting a generator if that doesn't go to plan. At this stage, we're aiming to have your power back on by 00:30 09/04/2026. If this changes, we'll let you know.


If you need more information, please send us a message on Whatsapp or call us on 105 and quote reference 'SY8303'
Faults.name: OX7 Area

Faults.message: Planned power cut: There is a Planned Power Cut in the area today so we can carry out essential work. Our engineers will complete this work as quickly as possible, and well keep you updated here on Power Track. All affected customers received a letter and a text reminder about this. If you have a power cut but didn't get a letter, please call us on105 or send us a message on Facebook or Twitter@ssencommunity)with reference '249813'.

Faults.name: BH23 Area

Faults.message:
We're sorry about the power cut in the area. The power cut is affecting 256 properties in the area shown on the map. We are working with our engineers to fix the problem as quickly as possible, and will keep you updated here on Power Track.

Engineers have arrived in the area. They are working hard to fix the problem and will get your power back on as quickly as possible. At this stage, we're aiming to have your power back on by 02:00 09/04/2026. If this changes, we'll let you know.

We've had reports of an overhead power line coming down. While the network is designed to automatically turn off if this happens, it's vital for you, your family, and pets to stay well back from any damaged equipment. Our engineers know exactly where the problem is and are working hard to make the situation safe, repair the wire and get your power back on. These types of faults often require extensive work and specialist teams which is why the restoration time seems so far away. If we can restore power sooner, we promise we will do so.

If you need more information, please send us a message on Whatsapp or call us on 105 and quote reference 'SY8768'
